title: calamagrostis aemula
intro: Calamagrostis aemula, also known as slender hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Consuming Calamagrostis aemula is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Calamagrostis aemula is often combined with other herbs to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat various health conditions.
